articles.title: Luna Foundation’s BTC Stash Nears Tesla’s — But Is Terra’s Buying Enough For BTC To Go Higher?
articles.description: The current aggressive accumulation of Bitcoin by Terra has no doubt been a positive catalyst for the cryptocurrency’s price. So far, through The Luna Foundation Guard (LFG), over $1.7 billion of Bitcoin has been purchased to backstop Terra’s algorithmic UST stablecoin.
